# Core-data digest (auto-generated by consolidate.py — cheap entry point for agents)

## Barely explored connections — THE HUNTING GROUND (full list)
- asymptotic-safety -> holography-adscft [conjecture] The UV value d_s=2 of the spectral dimension was proposed to ease tension between AS and the holographic counting of degrees of freedom, and it has been speculated that the UV fixed point might admit a CFT-dual description. No concrete AS/C
- asymptotic-safety -> loop-quantum-gravity [shared-structure] Both are non-perturbative, background-independent programs aiming to predict quantum geometry, but technically almost disjoint (continuum FRG vs. canonical/covariant discrete spectra). - asymptotic-safety -> group-field-theory [shared-math] GFT uses functional RG techniques to look for its own fixed points (asymptotic safety/freedom of GFT couplings), sharing the mathematics of the Wetterich equation but applied to combinatorial rather than metric structures. The bridge is met
- asymptotic-safety -> emergent-gravity [limit] If gravity is emergent (Sakharov induced gravity, entropic gravity), the Reuter fixed point could be effective rather than fundamental ('effective asymptotic safety'), explicitly invoked by Basile et al. (2025) as a loophole to swampland te
- asymptotic-safety -> experimental-tests [shared-structure] Potential empirical handles include UV-modified scattering cross sections, the retrodicted Higgs mass, the fine-structure constant, and cosmological/black-hole imprints of RG-improved dynamics. Direct Planck-scale tests are inaccessible, so
- asymptotic-safety -> twistors-amplitudes [shared-math] AS supplies non-perturbative momentum-dependent vertices from the effective action, enabling computation of graviton-mediated scattering amplitudes whose UV-decreasing cross sections respect the Froissart bound (Pastor-Gutierrez et al. 2024
- asymptotic-safety -> noncommutative-geometry [shared-structure] The 1/p^4 UV graviton propagator and d_s->2 dimensional reduction suggest an effective minimal length / smearing of spacetime points at the Planck scale, qualitatively echoing noncommutative-geometry and generalized-uncertainty scenarios. - asymptotic-safety -> causal-sets [shared-structure] Both seek a non-perturbative continuum limit of a discrete/coarse-grained gravitational path integral; causal sets provide an alternative regularization whose continuum approximation could in principle realize the same UV scaling. Direct co

- black-holes-information -> asymptotic-safety [shared-structure] Asymptotic safety gives a running G(k) and possible regular 'quantum-improved' black holes without singularities, possibly remnants. - black-holes-information -> causal-sets [shared-structure] Causal set theory predicts horizon-entropy fluctuations and order-by-disorder counting of causal links across the horizon (Sorkin spacetime entropy). - black-holes-information -> noncommutative-geometry [shared-structure] Noncommutative deformations of the horizon/spacetime modify the Hawking spectrum and can produce remnants (NC-inspired regular black holes). No connection to islands or replica wormholes. Evidence: modified evaporation in NC models.
- black-holes-information -> swampland [shared-structure] Swampland criteria (weak gravity, distance conjecture) constrain the spectrum and may exclude certain remnants / infinite degeneracies, echoing Susskind's arguments against remnants. Direct connection to the Page curve is sparse. Evidence: 
- black-holes-information -> experimental-tests [shared-structure] Astrophysical Hawking radiation is unobservably weak (~10^-8 K for a solar mass). - twistors-amplitudes -> asymptotic-safety [shared-structure] Both concern the UV behavior of gravity but by opposite routes: asymptotic safety seeks an interacting UV fixed point in an off-shell Euclidean effective action, while amplitudes probe on-shell finiteness of specific theories. No systematic
- twistors-amplitudes -> semiclassical-gravity [shared-structure] Self-dual/ASD curvature splitting and soft theorems have a semiclassical (gravitational memory) counterpart; Strominger's soft-theorem = memory = asymptotic-symmetry triangle is a bridge whose twistor side is newly being developed.
- twistors-amplitudes -> quantum-cosmology [shared-math] Positive geometry extends from the flat-space S-matrix to cosmological correlators (cosmological polytopes, kinematic flow, Bunch-Davies wavefunction), a new bridge to early-universe physics. Still at an early stage.
- twistors-amplitudes -> swampland [shared-structure] Positivity and locality of amplitudes (analyticity, hidden zeros) connect to swampland positivity bounds on EFT Wilson coefficients (constraints on consistent low-energy gravity). The precise link between amplituhedron positivity and swampl
- von-neumann-algebras -> causal-sets [conjecture] Sorkin's spacetime entanglement entropy (SSEE), built from the Pauli-Jordan and Wightman functions of the covariant Sorkin-Johnston state, yields an area law only after a geometric truncation of near-zero modes -- structurally parallel to h
- von-neumann-algebras -> loop-quantum-gravity [conjecture] Type III_1 makes subregion entanglement entropy UV-divergent, demanding a physical cutoff; LQG's discrete area spectrum and nonzero area gap (Delta-A ~ l_Pl^2) is a candidate microscopic regulator that could play the role the crossed-produc

## Most-shared open problems
- emergence-of-time (pillars: entanglement-spacetime, holography-adscft)
- lorentzian-vs-euclidean (pillars: asymptotic-safety)
- unitarity-ghosts (pillars: asymptotic-safety)
- background-independence-problem (pillars: asymptotic-safety)

- full-standard-model-compatibility (pillars: asymptotic-safety)

- factorization-puzzle (pillars: black-holes-information)

- interior-state-dependence (pillars: black-holes-information)
